title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入冰岛：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入冰島：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage documentation against Iceland's IST-referenced product alignment, EEA CE framework, Landsnet grid-connection expectations, fire and installation review, UN 38.3 transport rules, and Chinese GB/T baseline evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与冰岛 IST 对接产品要求、EEA CE 框架、Landsnet 并网预期、消防和现场安装审查、UN 38.3 运输规则及中国 GB/T 基线证据的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與冰島 IST 對接產品要求、EEA CE 框架、Landsnet 併網預期、消防和現場安裝審查、UN 38.3 運輸規則及中國 GB/T 基線證據的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, CE scope determination, grid-connection permit, fire-safety permit, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, designers, and installers should verify current Icelandic product-safety, grid, fire, transport, customs, and local authority requirements with qualified Icelandic professionals before shipment, sale, interconnection, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、CE 适用范围裁定、电网并网许可、消防许可、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发商、设计方和安装方在出货、销售、并网或安装前，应与具备资质的冰岛专业人士核实现行冰岛产品安全、电网、消防、运输、海关及地方主管机关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、CE 適用範圍裁定、電網併網許可、消防許可、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、併網或安裝前，應與具備資格的冰島專業人士核實現行冰島產品安全、電網、消防、運輸、海關及地方主管機關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Iceland, the practical baseline is EEA-aligned CE obligations for in-scope electrical, EMC, and radio functions, plus EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 evidence where battery batteries and lifecycle requirements are triggered. IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 are commonly used technical references, UN 38.3 supports lithium transport, and Landsnet interconnection plus Orkustofnun alignment is handled separately for each site and project class.
answer_first.zh: 中国 BESS 出口冰岛时，实务基线是适用于 CE 对齐范围内电气、EMC 与无线功能的 EEA 要求，以及触发时的欧盟电池条例（2023/1542）要求。IEC 62619 和 IEC 62933 常用于技术引用，UN 38.3 用于锂电运输，Landsnet 并网并网和 Orkustofnun 项目路径则需对每个站点和项目类别分别处理。
answer_first.zht: 中國 BESS 出口冰島時，實務基線是適用於 CE 對齊範圍內電氣、EMC 與無線功能的 EEA 要求，以及觸發時的歐盟電池規則（2023/1542）要求。IEC 62619 和 IEC 62933 常用於技術參考，UN 38.3 用於鋰電運輸，Landsnet 並網及 Orkustofnun 專案路徑則需對每個站點和項目類型分別處理。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, fire authority, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
